problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has a runtime receipt candidate and schema-binding witness, but the next evidence boundary needs a schema-backed receipt-store write-path witness proving future append-only, idempotent, digest-only store obligations while keeping live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptStoreWritePathWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the schema-binding witness, runtime receipt candidate, runner binding witness, emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal evidence

the future write path requires append-only storage, idempotency, tenant and actor refs, output digest only, WorkerFailureReceipt on error, effect reconciliation, UAO, Phi_gov, temporal lease evidence, and durability replay evidence
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing refs, write-path evaluation drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, live receipt-store registration evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial append evidence
raw output retention remains denied and only output digests may be carried
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime receipt-store write-path witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for write-path witness behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
